heading: Loans and transfers, alteration, and reproduction of stamps
label: 718e Loans and transfers, alteration, and reproduction of stamps

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: No person to whom has been sold a Migratory Bird Hunting and Conservation Stamp, validated as provided in , shall loan or transfer such stamp to any person during the period of its validity; nor shall any person other than the person validating such stamp use it for any purpose during such period.section 718a of this title

children.heading: Alteration
children.label: b Alteration
children.text: Except as provided in clauses (i) and (ii) of section 504()(D) of title 18, no person shall alter, mutilate, imitate, or counterfeit any stamp authorized by this subchapter, or imitate or counterfeit any die, plate, or engraving therefor, or make, print, or knowingly use, sell, or have in his possession any such counterfeit, die, plate, or engraving.l1So in original. Probably should be “504(1)(D)”.1
